import time
import collections
import threading

class RateLimiter:
    def __init__(self, limit: int, period: int):
        if not isinstance(limit, int) or limit <= 0:
            raise ValueError("Limit must be a positive integer.")
        if not isinstance(period, int) or period <= 0:
            raise ValueError("Period must be a positive integer.")

        self.limit = limit
        self.period = period
        self._requests_timestamps: dict[str, collections.deque[float]] = collections.defaultdict(collections.deque)
        self._lock = threading.Lock()

    def allow_request(self, user_id: str) -> bool:
        current_time = time.time()

        with self._lock:
            user_requests = self._requests_timestamps[user_id]

            while user_requests and user_requests[0] <= current_time - self.period:
                user_requests.popleft()

            if len(user_requests) < self.limit:
                user_requests.append(current_time)
                return True
            else:
                return False

if __name__ == '__main__':
    limiter = RateLimiter(limit=3, period=5) # 3 requests per 5 seconds
    user1 = "user_alpha"
    user2 = "user_beta"

    print(f"--- {user1} requests ---")
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}")
    time.sleep(1)
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}")
    time.sleep(1)
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}")
    time.sleep(1)
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}") # Should be False
    time.sleep(1)
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}") # Should be False

    print(f"\n--- {user2} independent requests ---")
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user2}: {limiter.allow_request(user2)}")
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user2}: {limiter.allow_request(user2)}")

    print(f"\n--- {user1} requests after waiting ---")
    time.sleep(2) # Wait for some previous requests of user1 to expire (total 5s waited since first req)
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}") # Should be True now
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}")
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}")
    print(f"Time: {time.time():.2f}, Allowed for {user1}: {limiter.allow_request(user1)}") # Should be False again
